title: Add support for non-power-of-two mem chunks in verific importer

features.name: multi-dimensional array with non-power-of-two elements
features.description: Code should include a multi-dimensional unpacked array declaration where the total element count is not a power of two

features.name: array initialization with default keyword
features.description: Code should include an array initialization using '{default:...}' syntax

features.name: variable index access to multi-dimensional array
features.description: Code should include multi-dimensional array access using variables as indices
